allow:
Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add database initialization script

Add init_db.py script to initialize all SQLite databases with one command.
Usage: python -m server.database.init_db [--data-dir DIR] [--quiet]

- Creates main database \(timao.db\)
- Creates AI databases \(memory_vectors.db, style_profiles.db, ai_usage_logs.db\)
- Creates sessions directory for monthly live session databases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
test: add SQLite integration tests

Add comprehensive integration tests for SQLite database workflow:
- Full initialization workflow with directory structure validation
- AI tables creation and verification
- Session database monthly rotation
- CRUD operations on memory vectors
- AI usage logging workflow
- Style profile creation and updates
- Global singleton workflow
- Multiple AI databases collaboration
- Concurrent access to different databases
- Database cleanup and reopen persistence
- Error handling scenarios
- Memory summaries workflow

All 13 new tests pass, total 39 database tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor\(ui\): 移除所有 emoji，改用 Lucide 图标系统

- 添加 lucide-react 依赖作为统一图标库
- 简化 global.css：移除复杂渐变、毛玻璃效果、重阴影
- 更新 ThemeToggle：彩色圆点替代 emoji 主题指示
- 更新所有页面：使用 Lucide 图标替代 emoji
  - FloatingWindowPage：Pin/X/Bot/MessageSquare/BarChart3 等
  - LiveConsolePage：Radio/Package/AlertTriangle/Settings 等
  - ToolsPage：Monitor/Trash2/FlaskConical/Brain/Type
  - DouyinRelayPanel：MessageSquare 替代 💬
- 状态指示器改用 CSS 彩色圆点（绿/红/黄）
- 设计风格：简洁专业的 refined minimal 风格

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(agents\): remove redundant _call_ai and optimize provider switching

- Remove redundant _call_ai method from AnalyzerAgent \(was duplicating run\(\) logic\)
- Move switch_provider call from run\(\) to __init__ to avoid switching on every call
- Update tests to mock get_gateway at module level for proper isolation
- Add verification that switch_provider is called only once during initialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(ui\): redesign with warm rose/peach aesthetic for emotional anchors

Optimize UI to match "情感主播" \(emotional anchor\) aesthetic with warm,
inviting design. Key changes:

- Primary accent changed from #ff6b4a to #ff7a5c \(warmer rose-orange\)
- Add new "蜜桃粉" \(rose\) theme with #f472b6
- Increase card border-radius from 16px to 20px for friendlier feel
- Add multi-layer soft shadows with subtle hover lift effect
- Add 0.2s smooth transitions with prefers-reduced-motion support
- Update all pages with warm gradient backgrounds and glass effects

Files updated:
- global.css: New color palette, larger radius, softer shadows
- ThemeToggle.tsx: New rose theme option
- AuthLayout.tsx: Warm gradient with decorative blur circles
- LoginPage/RegisterPage: Backdrop blur cards, rose accents
- MainLayout.tsx: Gradient background, gradient active nav
- DashboardPage: Card hover effects with lift
- LiveConsolePage: Cleaner control card design
- FloatingWindowPage: Rose-tinted gradient background
- ToolsPage: Gradient icon containers, cleaner sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:/gsxm/timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(agents\): add MemoryAgent with SQLite integration

- Add MemoryAgent for memory management using GLM-5
- Implement load/save memory actions with SQLite backend
- Use lazy-loaded database manager via get_sqlite_manager\(\)
- Add comprehensive test coverage \(6 test cases\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C "D:/gsxm/timao-douyin-live-manager" diff HEAD -- server/agents/memory.py server/agents/__init__.py tests/agents/test_memory.py)

Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(ui\): add staggered animations and enhanced micro-interactions

Improve user experience with smooth animations and interactive feedback:

Animation system:
- Staggered fade-in-up animations for cards and sections
- Slide-in animations for sidebar navigation
- Scale-in effect for auth forms
- Animated status indicators with pulse effect

Interactive improvements:
- Hover scale effects on icons and cards
- Smooth color transitions on interactive elements
- Card lift effect on hover with shadow enhancement
- Button press feedback with scale animation

Page-specific updates:
- MainLayout: Animated sidebar, header, and content sections
- DashboardPage: Staggered feature card animations
- ToolsPage: Sequential section reveal animations
- LoginPage/RegisterPage: Scale-in form animation

Performance:
- All animations use transform/opacity for GPU acceleration
- Respects prefers-reduced-motion for accessibility
- 150-300ms duration for responsive feel

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(ui\): increase z-index for ThemeToggle dropdown to display above all layers

- Parent container: z-[100]
- Dropdown menu: z-[9999]
- Backdrop overlay: z-[9998]

Ensures theme selector dropdown is always visible on top of all UI elements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(csp\): allow Google Fonts in Vite dev server CSP policy

Update Content-Security-Policy in vite.config.ts to allow loading
fonts from Google Fonts:
- style-src: add https://fonts.googleapis.com
- font-src: add https://fonts.gstatic.com

Fixes CSP violation error when loading Noto Sans SC and JetBrains Mono.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(ui\): fix ThemeToggle dropdown display and remove ocean theme

- Use fixed positioning with inline z-index: 99999 for dropdown
- Position dropdown based on button''s getBoundingClientRect\(\)
- Remove ocean \(blue\) theme from both ThemeToggle and global.css
- Keep 4 themes: mint, peach, coral, dark

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "D:\\gsxm\\timao-douyin-live-manager" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(ui\): use state for dropdown position to fix rendering issue

- Store dropdown position in state instead of reading ref during render
- Calculate position when dropdown opens via useEffect
- Prevents position calculation issues during initial render

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
